'''âsh-zh-p''' ('''kashazhap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mak|mak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mak|mak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kashazhap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazhap|thishazhap]] || [[word:jishazhap|jishazhap]] || [[word:shishazhap|shishazhap]] || [[word:kishazhap|kishazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushazhap|thuthushazhap]] || [[word:jujushazhap|jujushazhap]] || [[word:shushushazhap|shushushazhap]] || [[word:kukushazhap|kukushazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushazhap|thushazhap]] || [[word:jushazhap|jushazhap]] || [[word:shushazhap|shushazhap]] || [[word:kushazhap|kushazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushazhap|thushazhap]] || [[word:jushazhap|jushazhap]] || [[word:shushazhap|shushazhap]] || [[word:kushazhap|kushazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshazhap|theshazhap]] || [[word:jeshazhap|jeshazhap]] || [[word:sheshazhap|sheshazhap]] || [[word:keshazhap|keshazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshazhap|thothoshazhap]] || [[word:jojoshazhap|jojoshazhap]] || [[word:shoshoshazhap|shoshoshazhap]] || [[word:kokoshazhap|kokoshazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshazhap|thoshazhap]] || [[word:joshazhap|joshazhap]] || [[word:shoshazhap|shoshazhap]] || [[word:koshazhap|koshazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshazhap|thoshazhap]] || [[word:joshazhap|joshazhap]] || [[word:shoshazhap|shoshazhap]] || [[word:koshazhap|koshazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshazhap|thĂŠshazhap]] || [[word:jĂŠshazhap|jĂŠshazhap]] || [[word:shĂŠshazhap|shĂŠshazhap]] || [[word:kĂŠshazhap|kĂŠshazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashazhap|thathashazhap]] || [[word:jajashazhap|jajashazhap]] || [[word:shashashazhap|shashashazhap]] || [[word:kakashazhap|kakashazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashazhap|thashazhap]] || [[word:jashazhap|jashazhap]] || [[word:shashazhap|shashazhap]] || [[word:kashazhap|kashazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashazhap|thashazhap]] || [[word:jashazhap|jashazhap]] || [[word:shashazhap|shashazhap]] || [[word:kashazhap|kashazhap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashazhap|shashazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashazhap|goshashazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashazhap|gokishashazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashazhapnĂŒ|shashazhapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhapnknĂŒ|goshashazhapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhapnĂŒ|gokishashazhapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashazhapshĂ«|shashazhapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkshĂ«|goshashazhapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashazhapshĂ«|gokishashazhapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhapro|shashazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkro|goshashazhapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhapro|gokishashazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhapmu|shashazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkmu|goshashazhapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhapmu|gokishashazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashazhapsher|shashazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashazhapnksher|goshashazhapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashazhapsher|gokishashazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashazhapng|shashazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkng|goshashazhapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashazhapng|gokishashazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashazhapya|shashazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkya|goshashazhapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashazhapya|gokishashazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashazhapyam|shashazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkyam|goshashazhapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashazhapyam|gokishashazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhapnĂŒshĂ«|shashazhapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashazhapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashazhapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhapnĂŒro|shashazhapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhapnknĂŒro|goshashazhapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhapnĂŒro|gokishashazhapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhapnĂŒmu|shashazhapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhapnknĂŒmu|goshashazhapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhapnĂŒmu|gokishashazhapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhapshĂ«nĂŒ|shashazhapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashazhapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashazhapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhapshĂ«ro|shashazhapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkshĂ«ro|goshashazhapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhapshĂ«ro|gokishashazhapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhapshĂ«mu|shashazhapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkshĂ«mu|goshashazhapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhapshĂ«mu|gokishashazhapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhapronĂŒ|shashazhapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkronĂŒ|goshashazhapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhapronĂŒ|gokishashazhapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhaproshĂ«|shashazhaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkroshĂ«|goshashazhapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhaproshĂ«|gokishashazhaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhapromu|shashazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkromu|goshashazhapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhapromu|gokishashazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhapmunĂŒ|shashazhapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkmunĂŒ|goshashazhapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhapmunĂŒ|gokishashazhapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhapmushĂ«|shashazhapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkmushĂ«|goshashazhapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhapmushĂ«|gokishashazhapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhapmuro|shashazhapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhapnkmuro|goshashazhapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhapmuro|gokishashazhapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
